metaDescription: Complete Meta Ads and Google Ads guides for training centers in Morocco.
title: <highlight>Practical</highlight> guides
description: Detailed guides to master digital acquisition for your training center.

meta-ads-centre-formation.title: Complete Meta Ads guide for training centers
meta-ads-centre-formation.description: From strategy to scaling: audiences, creatives, budget, and optimization for the training sector.
steps: Define the offer and learner persona
Structure the ad account by training program
mistakes: Stopping campaigns before 14 days of learning

faqs.question: What Meta budget to start with?
faqs.answer: 8,000 MAD/month minimum to test one offer in one geographic area.

faqs.question: How many creatives to test?
faqs.answer: At least 3-5 variants per offer in continuous A/B testing.

google-ads-centre-formation.title: Google Ads guide for training centers
google-ads-centre-formation.description: Search, Performance Max, and landing pages to capture high-intent searches.
steps: Create a Search campaign per training program

faqs.question: Search or PMax first?
faqs.answer: Search for control, PMax to scale once conversions are tracked.

faqs.question: What Quality Score to aim for?
faqs.answer: 7+ on your main keywords through ad-page relevance.
